title: Pyrex Rectangular Dish with Plastic Lid, 2.6L
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: PIREX Rectangular pyrex container with lid 2.7 liters Food Container
Versatile product: ideal for cooking in the oven (without lid), storing in the refrigerator or freezer and for reheating in the microwave (without lid).

Pyrex borosilicate glass: withstands in the oven up to 300 °, withstands thermal shock: it can go from the -20 ° freezer directly to the 240 ° oven. Healthy and hygienic material that does not retain stains and odors, scratch resistant.
description: From the manufacturer Pyrex Rectangular Dish with Plastic Lid, 2.6L To prepare for a busy week’s meals or freeze leftovers, Pyrex has designed cook and freeze, a range of heat-resistant borosilicate glass oven ware, that allows you to move from freezer to oven and oven to freezer safely. Cook and freeze is designed to withstand a thermal shock of up to 220 °. Without handle and with straight lines, its design allows optimal storage in the freezer. Key features Straight sides and smart BPA-Free lids for storing food in the fridge or refrigerator Nestable and stackable ideal for saving space in your refrigerator The advantages of Pyrex borosilicate glass Supports extreme temperatures from -40 ° C to + 300 ° C Thermal shock resistant up to 220 ° C: Pyrex glass can go directly from the freezer at a temperature of - 20 ° C into the oven at a temperature of 200 ° C BPA free, hygienic material that doesn't retain stains or odours Scratch resistant

specifications_table.Specific uses: ‎Everyday kitchen use, meal prep, food storage, fridge and freezer, microwave reheating, serving
specifications_table.Care instructions: ‎Microwave Safe, Fridge & Freezer Dishwasher Oven Safe up to 300°C
